inputData.question: Show students count by department and current semester

{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show students count by department and current semester"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show students count by department and current semester"},"startedAt":1771804423579,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Count students grouped by department and students.current_semester using confirmed tables/columns. Include departments even if they have no students (LEFT JOIN). Order deterministically by department name then semester.","sql":"SELECT d.id AS department_id, d.name AS department_name, s.current_semester AS current_semester, COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.students s
  ON s.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, s.current_semester
ORDER BY d.name ASC, s.current_semester ASC NULLS LAST;","assumptions":["Include departments with zero students (LEFT JOIN)","current_semester is the integer column in public.students representing the student's current semester"]},"endedAt":1771804442735},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT d.id AS department_id, d.name AS department_name, s.current_semester AS current_semester, COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.students s
  ON s.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, s.current_semester
ORDER BY d.name ASC, s.current_semester ASC NULLS LAST;"},"startedAt":1771804442737,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT d.id AS department_id, d.name AS department_name, s.current_semester AS current_semester, COUNT(s.id) AS student_count

GROUP BY d.id, d.name, s.current_semester
ORDER BY d.name ASC, s.current_semester ASC NULLS visualization.title: Student count by department and current semester

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT d.id AS department_id, d.name AS department_name, s.current_semester AS current_semester, COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.students s
  ON s.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, s.current_semester
ORDER BY d.name ASC, s.current_semester ASC NULLS LAST;

visualization.title: Student count by department and current semester

result.sql:
SELECT d.id AS department_id, d.name AS department_name, s.current_semester AS current_semester, COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.students s
  ON s.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, s.current_semester
ORDER BY d.name ASC, s.current_semester ASC NULLS LAST;
